name: HTTP Use-Case Adapter
summary: Expose an existing use case through an HTTP framework by adapting request, state, result, and errors at the edge.

items: Extract HTTP state and request data in the handler.
Map the request into a use-case input type owned by the application layer.
Call exactly one use-case entry point from the handler path.
Map the use-case result into a response DTO and status code.
Map application errors into transport errors at the handler boundary.

blocks.reason: The adapter must preserve boundary ownership.
The pattern fits the layered backend architecture.
